properties.name: B.I.G. BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 18 Thornhill Rd, Green Point, Cape Town, 8005
properties.info: The best hostel in Cape Town. Top-rated across every platform. The free breakfast alone is worth the price. Book early — it fills fast.

properties.name: LONG STREET BACKPACKERS
properties.info: Cape Town's classic social hostel. The best single choice for solo travellers who want to meet people fast in the most central possible location.

properties.name: ASHANTI LODGE GARDENS
properties.info: One of Cape Town's most established backpacker lodges, set in a beautiful Victorian house in the leafy Gardens neighbourhood.

properties.name: URBAN HIVE BACKPACKERS
properties.info: A solid, unpretentious CBD base for the practical backpacker who prioritises central location and reasonable price over social atmosphere.

properties.name: VILLA VIVA CAPE TOWN
properties.address: 74 New Church St, Tamboerskloof, Cape Town, 8001
properties.info: An inspired choice for the socially curious traveller who wants to connect with Cape Town's creative community rather than just pass through it.

properties.name: STAGS HEAD INN
properties.info: A characterful inn in the heart of Gardens, well-located for the City Bowl and Kloof Street.

properties.name: CURIOCITY KLOOF STREET
properties.info: The premier choice for flashpackers, digital nomads, and solo women wanting a high-design, professionally managed, genuinely secure base.

properties.name: 91 LOOP BOUTIQUE HOSTEL
properties.info: The best all-rounder in the Cape Town CBD. Consistently top-rated, well-designed, central, and run with genuine care.

properties.name: FORTY 8 BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 48 Hout Street, Cape Town City Centre, 8000
properties.info: Solid budget option near District Six. Best for independent travellers who don't need a hostel community to have a good time.

properties.name: TWO OCEANS BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 47 Long Street, Cape Town City Centre, 8001
properties.info: Solid budget option in the City Bowl.

properties.name: ZEBRA CROSSING BACKPACKER LODGE
properties.address: 82 New Church Street, Tamboerskloof, Cape Town, 8001
properties.info: One of Cape Town's most underrated hostels. Excellent for solo travellers and couples wanting a warm, quiet, safe base in a beautiful neighbourhood.

properties.name: BOKAAP BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 5 Carl St, Schotsche Kloof, Cape Town, 8001
properties.info: Uniquely located in one of Cape Town's most beautiful and historically significant neighbourhoods.

properties.name: CURIOCITY GREEN POINT
properties.address: 153 Main Rd, Green Point, Cape Town, 8005
properties.info: The Waterfront-facing CURIOCITY option. Best for flashpackers and digital nomads who want to be walking distance from the V&A.

properties.name: BIG BLUE BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 7 Vesperdene Road, Green Point, Cape Town, 8005
properties.info: A physically impressive Victorian hostel in a great location. Check current reviews before booking.

properties.name: ATLANTIC POINT BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 2 Cavalcade Rd, Green Point, Cape Town, 8005
properties.info: A dependable, quiet budget base for the Atlantic Seaboard explorer.

properties.name: HOUSE ON THE HILL
properties.address: 5 Norman Rd, Green Point, Cape Town, 8005
properties.info: The best quiet option in the Atlantic Seaboard area. Highly recommended for those prioritising peace, views, and Signal Hill hiking.

properties.name: NEVER@HOME CAPE TOWN
properties.address: 107 Main Rd, Green Point, Cape Town, 8005
properties.info: A modern, well-managed, activity-focused hostel. Excellent staff. Above the mid-range average in almost every measure.

properties.name: A SUNFLOWER STOP BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 179 Main Road, Sea Point, Cape Town, 8005
properties.info: Highly recommended. Book the terrace room well in advance. One of Sea Point's finest budget options.

properties.name: MOJO HOTEL
properties.address: 30 Regent Rd, Sea Point, Cape Town, 8060
properties.info: The ultimate choice for social explorers, foodies, and digital nomads who thrive on urban energy and convenience.

properties.name: GREEN ELEPHANT BACKPACKERS
properties.info: Cape Town's finest hostel for the traveller who wants character, community, and bohemian neighbourhood atmosphere over centrality.

properties.name: AFRICAN HEART BACKPACKERS
properties.info: Reliable ultra-budget option in Observatory. Best for independent travellers who know what they want and don't need a hostel to organise it.

properties.name: BOHEMIAN LOFTS BACKPACKERS
properties.info: A characterful budget option with an artistic edge. Best for creatively inclined travellers who want Observatory's neighbourhood character.

properties.name: LIGHTHOUSE FARM BACKPACKERS
properties.address: A1 Oude Molen Eco Village, Alexandra Road, Pinelands, Cape Town, 7700
properties.info: Cape Town's most unique hostel setting. Essential for the traveller who wants something genuinely different from the standard backpacker circuit.

properties.name: RIVERLODGE BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 80 Alexandra Rd, Oude Molen Village, Pinelands, Cape Town, 7405
properties.info: The cheapest large-capacity option on this list. Suited to group bookings and airport-proximity overnights.

properties.name: HOUT BAY DUNE LODGE
properties.address: Dune Lodge, Hout Bay, Cape Town
properties.info: One of the finest backpacker lodges in South Africa. En-suite dorms, private terrace rooms, and an extraordinary location.

properties.name: SALTYCRAX BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 20 Briza Rd, Table View, Cape Town, 7439
properties.info: Cape Town's best hostel for water sports and adventure activities. TGCSA 5-star graded, 5 minutes from world-class kiteboarding.

properties.name: AFRICAN SOUL SURFER BACKPACKERS
properties.address: Surfers Corner, 13 York Road, Muizenberg, Cape Town, 7945
properties.info: The essential Cape Town surf hostel. Sea-view rooms with balconies at these prices, 50 metres from Surfers' Corner.

properties.name: CEDERBERG OASIS BACKPACKERS
properties.address: Cederberg Conservancy, via Op-Die-Berg / Algeria Road, Western Cape
properties.info: The definitive Cederberg backpacker base. If you are visiting the Cederberg for hiking and you are not sure where to stay, this is where you stay. Book the spare ribs when you arrive.

properties.name: GECKO CREEK WILDERNESS LODGE
properties.address: Gecko Creek Road, Cederberg Remhoogte, Western Cape (6km off the N7, 28km from Clanwilliam)
properties.info: The most beautiful setting in the Cederberg backpacker scene, on a private nature reserve, at prices that should not be possible. Bring cash, bring a torch, and bring at least two nights.

properties.name: HEUNINGVLEI BACKPACKERS LODGE
properties.info: The most remote, most unusual, and most ethically significant accommodation in the Cederberg. Not for casual visitors. Essential for serious travellers. Call ahead, bring a 4x4, bring all your food, and do not miss the community rock art guide.

properties.name: KHOTSO LODGE & HORSE TRAILS
properties.info: The best adventure farm experience in the Southern Drakensberg. Essential for horse riders; highly recommended for anyone who wants a genuinely immersive Southern Berg base. One of the best-value, most distinctive hostels in this guide.

properties.name: SANI LODGE BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 10.5km along the Sani Pass Road, Mkhomazana Wilderness Area, Himeville, 3257
properties.info: The finest ethically-run hostel in the Drakensberg, and one of the most beautifully located. The definitive Southern Berg base for the Sani Pass, Fair Trade credentials, and genuine wilderness immersion. Highly recommended without reservation.

properties.name: MOUNTAIN BASE BACKPACKERS
properties.address: R600 Cathkin Road, Champagne Valley, Central Drakensberg
properties.info: The best budget option in the Central Berg. Outstanding value for hikers and activity-seekers targeting the Champagne Valley and Cathedral Peak area.

properties.name: BERG BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The best-value private room option in the Central Berg. Ideal for couples and pairs who want farm quiet, mountain access, and no dorm compromise.

properties.name: AMPHITHEATRE BACKPACKERS LODGE
properties.info: The Northern Berg's most social hostel. Arrive with your guide booked independently, your activity budget decided, and your expectations calibrated. For the Tugela Falls hike specifically, Maluti Backpackers is the more practical base.

properties.name: MALUTI BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 3232 Nteo Street, Phuthaditjhaba-A, Phuthaditjhaba, 9866, Free State
properties.info: ★ BackpackersBible.com's recommended base for the Tugela Falls hike. The closest accommodation to the Sentinel Car Park trailhead; also the best base for Golden Gate Highlands National Park. Practical, honest, and community-supporting. The platform ratings do not capture what matters most here: the proximity.

properties.name: KARMA BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 2 Piet Retief Street, Kestell, Free State, 9860
properties.info: A Free State option at roughly the midpoint between Amphitheatre and the trailhead. Adequate for the area, although there is little or nothing to do in the town of Kestell itself.

properties.name: TEKWENI BACKPACKERS HOSTEL
properties.info: Durban's benchmark backpacker hostel. The default booking for anyone passing through the city. Florida Road is right there. Book it.

properties.name: GIBELA TRAVELLERS LODGE
properties.info: The Berea's best-value base. Quieter than Tekweni, equally well-located, and the garden views are something special. Best for travellers who want a residential feel over a hostel buzz.

properties.name: NOMADS BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The budget choice on the Berea. Reliable, honest, functional. Good value for travellers who are counting rands without wanting to compromise on neighbourhood quality.

properties.name: AWEH AFRICA BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 121 Briar Lane, Park Hill, Durban North, 4051
properties.info: The budget leader in Durban North. Basic, clean, friendly, and genuinely connected to the city's culture. The best choice for travellers on the tightest budgets who want the right neighbourhood.

properties.name: ANSTEYS BEACH BACKPACKERS
properties.info: Direct beach access, excellent surf, and review scores that reflect years of consistent quality. The ocean-first choice in the city.

properties.name: DURBAN BACKPACKERS — ON THE BEACH
properties.info: The ocean-view backpacker experience in Durban and the premier choice for flashpackers who want to wake up to the sun rising over the ocean in a safe, upscale neighbourhood.

properties.name: PEACEVALE BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The overlander's and camper's Durban base. Cheapest rates, greenest setting, most rural character. Best for travellers with their own transport using Durban as a staging point.

properties.name: ORANGE ELEPHANT BACKPACKERS
properties.address: R335 Main Road, Addo, Eastern Cape, 6105
properties.info: The essential Addo base. Go for the safari. Stay for the stories.

properties.name: BLUE SKIES BACKPACKERS
properties.address: R350 Cradock Road (near Makhanda Airfield), Makhanda (Grahamstown), Eastern Cape, 6140
properties.info: Makhanda's best-value base, owned by the kind of host who makes a hostel a home. The skydiving is optional. The Sean recommendation is not.

properties.name: THE SMOKEY MOON
properties.address: Three Chimneys Farm, Worcester Street Extension, Makhanda, 6139
properties.info: Makhanda's most atmospheric option. Bohemian, historic, affordable, and best suited to travellers who value character over consistency.

properties.name: AWAY WITH THE FAIRIES BACKPACKERS
properties.info: Hogsback's most established backpackers, in the most spectacular location in the village. The cliff, the bath, the bar, the pizza, the trails from the gate. This is where Hogsback happens.

properties.name: TERRA KHAYA ECO BACKPACKERS
properties.info: For nature-lovers, eco-travellers, conscious explorers, and anyone who needs to remember what silence sounds like. The outdoor bath at sunset is worth the entire trip on its own.

properties.name: ELUNDINI BACKPACKERS
properties.address: Elundini Village, Lushington, Hogsback Area, 5721, Eastern Cape
properties.info: The most singular experience on this guide. Genuine Xhosa village hospitality, extraordinary community, perfect silence, and stars that do not look real. Come here.

properties.name: OWLHOUSE BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The essential Nieu-Bethesda accommodation option — welcoming, eco-conscious, expertly located, and run with the personal warmth that only owner-managed properties can sustain. Two nights minimum. Ask Ian about Aunt Evelyn's.

properties.name: LEGENDS BACKPACKERS LODGE
properties.address: 2 Mantenga Falls Road, Ezulwini Valley, Eswatini
properties.info: Eswatini's most convenient backpacker base. The default first-night stop in the Ezulwini Valley. Central location, pool, good travel desk. Book well ahead for Bushfire Festival weekend.

properties.name: LIDWALA BACKPACKER LODGE
properties.address: Sheba's Breast Road, Ezulwini Valley, Eswatini
properties.info: The finest backpacker lodge in Eswatini. Hillside setting, valley views, walking access to Mlilwane, and a sunset terrace that explains why people keep coming back. Book a chalet.

properties.name: SONDZELA BACKPACKERS
properties.address: Mlilwane Wildlife Sanctuary, Malkerns, Eswatini (enter via Sangweni Gate)
properties.info: The best hostel in Eswatini. Sleep inside a wildlife sanctuary in a traditional beehive hut, wake to zebra outside the door, and pay hostel dorm prices for it. One of the genuinely great backpacker experiences in southern Africa. Book the beehive hut well in advance.

properties.name: ENTSABENI BACKPACKERS
properties.address: Entsabeni Farm, Big Bend, Lubombo District, Eswatini
properties.info: The strategic stopover for the Mozambique route. Honest, well-located, and the right place to sleep the night before an early Lomahasha border crossing. Book direct and confirm availability in advance.

properties.name: CLARENS INN AND BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 403 Van Reenen Street, Clarens, 9707, Free State
properties.info: The only show in town, in the best possible sense. Clarens at the right price, in the right location, with the mountains visible from the garden.

properties.name: MALUTI BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 3232 Nteo Street, Phuthaditjhaba-A, Phuthaditjhaba, 9866, Free State
properties.info: ★ BackpackersBible.com's recommended base for the Tugela Falls hike. The closest accommodation to the Sentinel Car Park trailhead; also the best base for Golden Gate Highlands National Park. Practical, honest, and community-supporting. The platform ratings do not capture what matters most here: the proximity.

properties.name: KARMA BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 2 Piet Retief Street, Kestell, Free State, 9860
properties.info: A Free State option at roughly the midpoint between Amphitheatre and the trailhead. Adequate for the area, although there is little or nothing to do in the town of Kestell itself.

properties.name: PARK HOUSE LODGE
properties.info: Mossel Bay's best hostel. Consistently excellent Booking.com score. Good base for the St Blaize Trail, shark diving, and the western Garden Route.

properties.name: MILE CRUNCHERS BACKPACKERS
properties.info: Budget option only. Fine for a transit night if Park House is full. Choose Park House if both are available.

properties.name: SANTOS EXPRESS TRAIN LODGE
properties.address: Munro Road, Santos Beach, Mossel Bay, 6500
properties.info: The most unique accommodation experience in Mossel Bay. Recommended for its novelty, beachfront location, and honest value. Book a Royal Suite if you can stretch the budget.

properties.name: SHARK SHACK BACKPACKERS
properties.info: Primarily useful as a shark diving booking base. For general accommodation in Mossel Bay, choose Park House or Santos Express instead.

properties.name: GEORGE BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 5 St John's Street, Dormehls Drift, George, 6529
properties.info: The practical Garden Route airport stopover. Best for hire car collections, Baz Bus connections, and anyone who knows about Victoria Bay surf and wants to stay for it.

properties.name: WILDERNESS BEACH HOUSE BACKPACKERS
properties.info: Excellent location and strong ratings. One of the finest hostel settings in Wilderness.

properties.name: FAIRY KNOWE BACKPACKERS
properties.info: One of the Garden Route's finest natural settings. Genuinely beautiful.

properties.name: THE WILD FARM BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The best alternative to Fairy Knowe and Beach House in Wilderness. Excellent for independent travellers with a car who want farm quiet and mountain views. Clean employment ethics.

properties.name: SEDGEFIELD BACKPACKER
properties.info: The Garden Route's quiet gem. Best for independent travellers with a car who want the coast without the crowd. The Saturday markets alone are worth planning around.

properties.name: PILIPILI BEACH CABANAS
properties.address: 2 Claude Urban Drive, Myoli Beach, Sedgefield, 6573
properties.info: The beachfront Sedgefield choice. Good value in cabanas; expensive in dorms. Best for couples and activity-focused travellers.

properties.name: THE RIVERDECK LODGE AND BACKPACKERS
properties.info: Best for the riverside cabin experience and the restaurant. For social backpacker Knysna, choose Island Vibe or Knysna Backpackers in town instead.

properties.name: ISLAND VIBE BACKPACKERS KNYSNA
properties.info: The reliable central Knysna social hostel. Good for solo travellers on the Baz Bus circuit. Clean employment ethics.

properties.name: KNYSNA BACKPACKERS
properties.info: A good choice for travellers seeking peace and quiet.

properties.name: KEEDOLS INN & BACKPACKERS
properties.info: Best for groups. The 18-sleeper unit is exceptional value. Good boutique option for independent solo travellers who prefer personal over brand. Clean employment ethics.

properties.name: AMAKAYA BACKPACKERS & APARTMENTS
properties.info: Best for longer stays and self-catering travellers. Good value apartments. Clean employment ethics. For short stays, Nothando is the better Plett choice.

properties.name: PLETT BEACHFRONT ACCOMMODATION
properties.info: Strong Plett choice, especially for solo women. Good ratings, beachside location, female dorm available. Nothando remains the overall Plett recommendation.

properties.name: PLETT BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The central Main Street option with a penthouse twist. Good for Baz Bus travellers wanting to be in the middle of Plett's action.

properties.name: NOTHANDO BACKPACKERS ★
properties.info: ★ The best hostel in Plettenberg Bay. #1 on Hostelworld (9.7/10). The top solo female recommendation on the Garden Route. TGCSA 5-star graded. Outstanding employment ethics. The Robberg hike starts 10 minutes away. Book it.

properties.name: WILD SPIRIT BACKPACKERS LODGE
properties.address: Khoinania Farm, R102 Nature's Valley Road, The Crags, 6602
properties.info: A beautiful property in an extraordinary location.

properties.name: TUBE 'N AXE BUDGET ACCOMMODATION
properties.info: The definitive Storms River adventure hostel. Essential for Bloukrans bungee, Blackwater Tubing, and Tsitsikamma activity access. Hot tubs, fire pit, full restaurant. Clean employment ethics.

properties.name: DIJEMBE BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The quiet, characterful alternative to Tube 'n Axe. Log cabins, female dorm, rustic forest setting. Same activities, less noise. Highly recommended for independent travellers and solo women. Clean employment ethics.

properties.name: BACKPACKERS CONNECTION
properties.address: 16 Beech Avenue, Highway Gardens, Edenvale, Johannesburg, 1609
properties.info: The essential airport hostel. Perfect first or last night for anyone transiting through OR Tambo — clean, calm, personal, and managed by people who genuinely understand what tired travellers need.

properties.name: BROWN SUGAR BACKPACKERS
properties.info: Johannesburg's most characterful hostel, in a genuinely extraordinary building. The free airport pickup, hot breakfast, and on-site tour desk make it one of the most complete value packages in the city. Book a private room or the Glass Room, not the 18-bed dorm.

properties.name: GEMINI BACKPACKERS LODGE
properties.info: A reliable budget transit option near the airport. No frills, no surprises. Best suited to travellers who need a clean, quiet night near OR Tambo and nothing else.

properties.name: MIKASA SUKASA BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The most characterful of the East cluster. Good value, good atmosphere, and an unexpectedly social environment for an airport-proximity hostel. The Caribbean-themed bar will either delight you or confuse you.

properties.name: TERRYLINN BACKPACKERS HOSTEL
properties.info: An unpretentious budget option in the East Rand zone. Best for travellers whose only requirement is a clean, affordable, quiet night near the airport.

properties.name: LAKEVIEW BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 39 Porto Amelia Avenue, Bonaero Park, Kempton Park, 1622
properties.info: The East Rand's scenic option — ideal for safari returnees and couples who want to decompress in natural surroundings. Book the private room for the full effect.

properties.name: ACCOUSTIX LODGE & BACKPACKER
properties.address: 477 Jan Smuts Avenue, Blairgowrie, Randburg, Johannesburg, 2194
properties.info: The cheapest north-side option, with enough character (the music bar, the pool) to make it workable for the right traveller. Best for budget overlanders and group travellers.

properties.name: JOBURG BACKPACKERS
properties.info: A well-positioned, well-managed social hostel in one of Johannesburg's most characterful residential neighbourhoods. Strong choice for solo travellers who want engagement with the real city.

properties.name: EXPLORER BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The best hostel in Johannesburg. Consistently the highest-rated on all major platforms, in the best neighbourhood for safety and walkability. Book early — it fills up.

properties.name: ROSEBANK BACKPACKERS CENTRAL
properties.address: 219 Jan Smuts Avenue, Parktown North, Johannesburg, 2193
properties.info: The location is the product; the management is the risk. Solo women should choose Explorer Backpackers or Curiocity instead.

properties.name: CURIOCITY BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The definitive inner-city Johannesburg hostel. Voted one of the top 10 industrial-chic hostels in the world by The Guardian. In the most culturally significant neighbourhood, with the best guided experience programme in the city. Stay at least three nights.

properties.name: LEBO'S SOWETO BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 10823 Pooe St, Orlando West, Soweto, Johannesburg, 1804
properties.info: The essential Johannesburg experience. Highest-rated hostel in the city on most platforms. The bicycle tour alone justifies the stay. Book a private room, allow at least two nights, take every tour on offer.

properties.name: GO BAVIAANS — CEDAR FALLS BASE CAMP
properties.address: Cedar Falls Farm, Baviaanskloof, Willowmore, 6445, Eastern Cape
properties.info: The single most spectacular outdoor adventure base camp on this entire guide. If you hike or cycle and are in the Eastern Cape for more than a week, the Baviaanskloof via Go Baviaans is non-negotiable. Book the Leopard Trail months in advance.

properties.name: OWLHOUSE BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The essential Nieu-Bethesda accommodation option — welcoming, eco-conscious, and run with personal warmth. Two nights minimum. Ask Ian about Aunt Evelyn's.

properties.name: LODGE 96
properties.info: The best-facilities hostel in Oudtshoorn — en-suite dorms at backpacker prices, excellent pool. Arrange the George shuttle when you book.

properties.name: KAROO SOUL BACKPACKERS & COTTAGES
properties.info: Ranked #1 in Oudtshoorn hostels across all major platforms. If you are staying in Oudtshoorn, Karoo Soul is where you should be.

properties.name: OASIS SHANTI BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The food-forward, garden-centred option in Oudtshoorn — standout for the ostrich egg breakfast, on-site restaurant, and large pool.

properties.name: SWARTBERG BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The finest eco-farm wilderness experience in the Little Karoo. 45km from Oudtshoorn, fully self-catering. Louis is the reason for the five stars. Book well in advance — there are only two units.

properties.name: BACKPACKERS PARADISE
properties.info: The definitive Oudtshoorn backpacker base. Reliable, central, and consistently good value.

properties.name: KRUGER VIEW BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The most strategically positioned safari base for dedicated wildlife travellers. Southern Kruger access, bush atmosphere, backpacker prices.

properties.name: KRUGER INN BACKPACKERS
properties.info: A genuine bush base for Kruger visitors who want to actually be in the Lowveld environment. The wildlife experience starts the moment you arrive.

properties.name: OLD VIC TRAVELLERS INN
properties.info: A no-nonsense, reliably central base with a longstanding independent reputation. Good for self-sufficient backpackers who want location and value without extras.

properties.name: HAZYVIEW ADVENTURE BACKPACKERS
properties.address: Route R40, Numbi Park, Hazyview, 1240, Mpumalanga
properties.info: The premier adventure-activity hostel in the Mpumalanga Lowveld. Ideal for backpackers who want to do Kruger, the Panorama Route, and every activity in between from a single energetic base.

properties.name: SHIK SHACK TOURS & BACKPACKERS
properties.address: Off the R531 Orpen Road, Sigagule Village, Acornhoek, 1380, Mpumalanga
properties.info: The best-organised base for first-time Panorama Route and Kruger visitors. The integrated tour desk is a significant practical advantage.

properties.name: MALEALEA LODGE
properties.address: 1 Main Road, Nr Matelile, Malealea, Mafeteng District, Lesotho
properties.info: The finest backpacker lodge in Lesotho, and one of the finest in southern Africa. Go for two nights. Stay for five. Book the multi-day pony trek.

properties.name: RAMABANTA TRADING POST ADVENTURES & LODGE
properties.address: A3 Road, Ramabanta, Maseru District, Lesotho
properties.info: The finest overnight stop on the Maseru–Semonkong route. The cliff-edge view, the home-cooked food, and the proximity to Thaba Bosiu make this essential. Book dinner in advance.

properties.name: SATVIK BACKPACKERS
properties.address: GV72 Georges Valley, R528, Tzaneen, Limpopo, 0850
properties.info: The right hostel for the right traveller — bush setting, minimal cost, and the real Lowveld. Confirm by WhatsApp before arriving and plan to arrive in daylight.

properties.name: ELEPHANT WALK GUESTHOUSE & BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The most strategically placed budget accommodation in Limpopo for Kruger via the Phalaborwa Gate. Book direct, arrive before 20h00, bring mosquito repellent.

properties.name: PMB BACKPACKERS LODGE
properties.info: The practical choice for budget travellers using Pietermaritzburg as a base for Midlands exploration.

properties.name: MSUNDUZI RIVER VIEW BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The more relaxed, nature-adjacent alternative to central PMB accommodation.

properties.name: RIVERSIDE MANOR
properties.info: The countryside base of choice for travellers who want the Midlands Meander, Howick Falls, and the Karkloof on their doorstep.

properties.name: SUMMER PLACE BACKPACKERS LODGE
properties.info: The perfect base for the northern Meander — quiet, rural, affordable, and exactly the kind of place that turns a one-night stop into a three-day stay.

properties.name: ERMELO BACKPACKERS
properties.info: A functional transit hostel for the KZN-to-Mpumalanga route. Not a destination in itself, but reliably useful when you need it.

properties.name: SHIK SHACK TOURS & BACKPACKERS
properties.address: Off the R531 Orpen Road, Sigagule Village, Acornhoek, 1380
properties.info: The best-organised base for first-time Panorama Route and Kruger visitors. The integrated tour desk is a significant practical advantage.

properties.name: VALLEY VIEW BACKPACKERS GRASKOP
properties.info: The best view in Graskop at a budget price. Perfect for self-driving backpackers who want a beautiful base and the freedom to design their own Panorama Route day.

properties.name: SABIE BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The most relaxed base on the Panorama Route. Best for travellers who want waterfalls, forest, and a slower pace. Pairs well with a day trip to Pilgrim's Rest.

properties.name: OLD VIC TRAVELLERS INN
properties.info: A no-nonsense, reliably central base. Good for self-sufficient backpackers who want location and value without extras.

properties.name: KRUGER INN BACKPACKERS
properties.info: A genuine bush base for Kruger visitors who want to actually be in the Lowveld environment.

properties.name: HAZYVIEW ADVENTURE BACKPACKERS
properties.address: Route R40, Numbi Park, Hazyview, 1240, Mpumalanga
properties.info: The premier adventure-activity hostel in the Mpumalanga Lowveld. Book the sunrise game drive on your first night.

properties.name: BILLY BONGO BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The most characterful hostel in the Lowveld Kruger gateway area. Best for travellers who want a safari base with personality.

properties.name: KRUGER VIEW BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The most strategically positioned safari base for dedicated wildlife travellers. Southern Kruger access, bush atmosphere, backpacker prices.

properties.name: BALLITO BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The only viable backpacker option on the KZN North Coast. Across the road from the beach in the middle of Ballito's commercial centre. Book an en-suite unit.

properties.name: AARDWOLF BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 22 Doctor Nelson Mandela Drive, Upington, Northern Cape, 8801
properties.info: The Northern Cape's best backpacker — and the only one in Upington. Essential for anyone using Upington as a Kgalagadi base or a stopover on the Cape Town–Namibia route.

properties.name: AUGRABIES BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The Northern Cape's most characterful backpacker — remote, rustic, on the doorstep of Augrabies Falls. Call ahead to confirm current conditions.

properties.name: THE GROWCERY CAMP
properties.info: The essential Namibia-route stopover. The best-positioned budget camp on the Cape Town–Windhoek corridor. Book the riverside camping site. Swim in the river. Cross the border in the morning.

properties.name: HODGE PODGE BACKPACKERS LODGE
properties.address: Plot 66 Kommiesdrift, Oliphants Nek, Rustenburg, North West, 0350
properties.info: The only budget option for the Pilanesberg/Magaliesberg circuit, in a genuinely beautiful mountain setting. Read the honest note about security before booking.

properties.name: PALJAS BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 22 Esselen Street, Cachet Bult Park, Potchefstroom, North West, 2531
properties.info: Adequate at its best. Book with lowered expectations and a back-up plan.

properties.name: HERMANUS BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The essential Hermanus base. Book well ahead for September and October whale season.

properties.name: ZOETE INVAL TRAVELLERS LODGE
properties.info: The finest backpackers hostel in Hermanus. Free breakfast, locked gate, 30-year family stewardship, outstanding staff culture. Highly recommended without reservation.

properties.name: ZZZONE BOUTIQUE HOSTEL & BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The best sleep in Hermanus, bar none. Boutique comfort at mid-range prices, 200 metres from everything on the Hermanus activity circuit.

properties.name: SWELLENDAM BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The Overberg's most accessible backpacker hostel and a genuinely worthwhile overnight stop in one of South Africa's most historically interesting small towns.

properties.name: MCGREGOR BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The only logical base for budget travellers in McGregor. A backpackers that consistently over-delivers on its price point, in a village that consistently over-delivers on its reputation.

properties.name: CAPE AGULHAS BACKPACKERS
properties.info: One of the Overberg's most characterful backpackers in a genuinely extraordinary location at the southernmost tip of Africa.

properties.name: WITSAND POSHPACKERS
properties.info: The best poshpackers in the Overberg. En-suite dorms, Breede River estuary, kite surfing, and owners who actually care. The perfect western gateway to the Garden Route.

properties.name: PRETORIA BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The most warmly-managed hostel in Pretoria — family-run, excellent value with free breakfast, and a perfect staging post for Kruger-bound travellers.

properties.name: 1322 BACKPACKERS INTERNATIONAL
properties.info: The best-connected hostel in Pretoria — solar-powered, Baz Bus-accessible, 500 metres from the Gautrain, run by an owner who is genuinely present and engaged.

properties.name: PUMBAS BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The best choice in Pretoria for solo women — quiet garden-lodge atmosphere with genuine privacy, 11 minutes' walk from the Gautrain.

properties.name: TOM'S BACKPACKERS
properties.info: A scenic rural escape in the Schurveberg Mountains. Perfect for quiet decompression; check whether group events coincide with your dates before booking.

properties.name: TWANA BACKPACKERS LODGE
properties.info: The essential Pretoria base for overlanders heading northeast. On-site vehicle workshop, 76 beds, camping, and adventure tours to six countries.

properties.name: DE BOS GUEST FARM & BACKPACKERS
properties.info: Montagu's climbers' hostel — where Cape Town's climbing community has based itself for weekends for decades. Beautiful farm setting even for non-climbers.

properties.name: TOLBOS BACKPACKERS
properties.info: Functional transit stopover in Worcester. Inconsistent enough to warrant caution. Confirm your booking directly the day before.

properties.name: ROBERTSON BOUTIQUE BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The benchmark for the Route 62 corridor. Stay three nights minimum — one for recovery, one for the river, one for the wine estates. Book the garden en-suite room well in advance.

properties.name: BARRYDALE BACKPACKERS & DUNG BEETLE PUB
properties.info: A characterful Route 62 pub-stop with attached accommodation, at its best on a Saturday night with a braai and a crowd. Verify current ownership before travelling.

properties.name: BACKPACKERS PARADISE
properties.info: The definitive Oudtshoorn backpacker base. Reliable, central, and consistently good value.

properties.name: LODGE 96
properties.info: The best-facilities hostel in Oudtshoorn — en-suite dorms at backpacker prices, excellent pool. Arrange the George shuttle when you book.

properties.name: KAROO SOUL BACKPACKERS & COTTAGES
properties.info: Ranked #1 in Oudtshoorn hostels across all major platforms. If you are staying in Oudtshoorn, Karoo Soul is where you should be.

properties.name: OASIS SHANTI BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The food-forward, garden-centred option in Oudtshoorn. Standout for the ostrich egg breakfast, on-site restaurant, and large pool.

properties.name: SWARTBERG BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The finest eco-farm wilderness experience in the Little Karoo. 45km from Oudtshoorn, fully self-catering. Book well in advance — there are only two units.

properties.name: ALIWAL DIVE CENTRE
properties.info: The non-negotiable stop on the South Coast for anyone with even a passing interest in diving. Book a multi-day dive package. Get in the water.

properties.name: THE SPOT BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The classic South Coast backpacker experience, well-executed and honestly priced. Fills up on word of mouth and stays full on repeat business.

properties.name: DRIFTWOOD BACKPACKING LODGE
properties.info: The uncomplicated South Coast backpacker experience. Small, honest, well-located, and exactly what it says it is.

properties.name: PUMULA SURF CAMP
properties.info: The South Coast's best surf school experience. Learn to surf here, in warm water, with good instruction and great value. If the sardine run is on, nothing else on this coast compares.

properties.name: MANTIS AND MOON BACKPACKERS LODGE
properties.info: The South Coast's most beautiful backpacker setting. Solo female travellers' first choice. One of the best-value overnight experiences on the entire KZN coast.

properties.name: UMZUMBE SURF HOUSE & SURF CAMP
properties.info: The South Coast's premier dedicated surf camp. If surfing is the reason you're on the coast, this is your base.

properties.name: THE EARTHWORM MARGATE BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The South Coast's best transit hub and hire-car base. Functional, affordable, central.

properties.name: SEALS BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 116 Da Gama Road, Cape St. Francis, 6312, Eastern Cape
properties.info: An unconventional backpacker option next to one of South Africa's most famous waves. Not for the social hostel crowd — ideal for surfers and couples wanting a resort base at hostel-adjacent prices.

properties.name: ST FRANCIS BAY BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 3 Assissi Drive, St Francis Bay, 6312, Eastern Cape
properties.info: The best-equipped small backpackers in the St Francis area, in a uniquely beautiful village.

properties.name: ISLAND VIBE BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The iconic Jeffreys Bay surf hostel. The view, the location, and the direct beach access are without peer on the Sunshine Coast. Book a sea-view room. Bring earplugs for weekends.

properties.name: JEFFREYS BAY BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 12 Jeffrey Street, Jeffreys Bay, Eastern Cape, 6330
properties.info: The sensible town-centre alternative to Island Vibe. Pool, garden chalets, good kitchen, five minutes to everything.

properties.name: AFRICAN UBUNTU BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 8 Cherry Street, Wavecrest, Jeffreys Bay, Eastern Cape, 6330
properties.info: The standout hostel of the Sunshine Coast. Best-reviewed, best value, most ethically run, most recommended by solo women. If you can only stay at one place in Jeffreys Bay, this is the one.

properties.name: THE LITTLE HOUSE ON SUPERS AT SUPERTUBES
properties.info: Fifty metres from Supertubes. The definitive Jeffreys Bay self-catering option for small surf groups. Best suited to groups of 3–6.

properties.name: IKHAYALAM LODGE AND TOURS
properties.info: Best for travellers using Gqeberha as a jumping-off point for Eastern Cape activities. The in-house tour operation is the differentiator.

properties.name: LUNGILE BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 12 La Roche Drive, Humewood, Gqeberha (Port Elizabeth), 6001
properties.info: Gqeberha's best all-round backpackers. Best location, best staff, best maintained. The default choice for the Sunshine Coast's transit hub.

properties.name: JIKELEZA LODGE BACKPACKERS HOSTEL
properties.info: Gqeberha's heritage hostel. Unbeatable for budget travellers wanting to extract maximum adventure from the province. The travel desk alone is worth the dorm fee.

properties.name: THE HIPPO BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 14 Glen Street, Richmond Hill, Gqeberha (Port Elizabeth), 6001
properties.info: The most comfortable mid-range backpackers in Gqeberha. Best Addo/Schotia safari package value in the city. The Richmond Hill location is the secret weapon.

properties.name: RIVERFRONT BACKPACKERS
properties.info: Gqeberha's alternative for the eco-traveller — river-mouth location, on-site restaurant, private boma baths, Big 5 day trips on the doorstep.

properties.name: WOODLANDS COTTAGES & BACKPACKERS
properties.address: R343 Grahamstown Road, Kenton-on-Sea, Eastern Cape
properties.info: The Sunshine Coast's most atmospheric bush-and-river property. Extraordinary setting, on-site restaurant, private boma baths, Big 5 day trips on the doorstep.

properties.name: ORANGE ELEPHANT BACKPACKERS
properties.address: R335 Main Road, Addo, Eastern Cape, 6105
properties.info: The essential Addo base. Go for the safari. Stay for the stories.

properties.name: WILD WOODY CAPE BACKPACKERS
properties.address: Woody Cape Beach, Alexandria, Eastern Cape, 6185
properties.info: One of the most dramatically located backpackers on the entire South African coast. The Alexandria Trail, the world's biggest active dune field, and Addo Elephant Park all within reach.

properties.name: KOWIE BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 13 Van Riebeeck Street, Port Alfred, Eastern Cape, 6170
properties.info: Port Alfred's sole backpackers option. Book it as part of a Sunshine Coast road trip. Stay longer than you planned.

properties.name: HAMBURG BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The most extraordinary off-the-beaten-track backpackers on the Sunshine Coast. If you have the time and the willingness to take a 14km dirt road, Hamburg will reward you more profoundly than anywhere else in this guide.

properties.name: BUFFALO BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 79 Moore Street, Quigney, East London, Eastern Cape, 5201
properties.info: East London's practical alternative backpackers — purpose-built, secure parking, close to the beach. Best for travellers in transit on the Sunshine Coast / Wild Coast circuit.

properties.name: SUGAR SHACK BACKPACKERS
properties.address: Eastern Esplanade Rd, Eastern Beach, East London, 5201
properties.info: East London's iconic surf hostel, with an extraordinary location and a legendary lookout tower. Come for the surf and the tower.

properties.name: BUCCANEERS LODGE & BACKPACKERS
properties.info: One of the great South African backpacker experiences. The Sunshine Coast's most social hostel, in the most beautiful location.

properties.name: WINDSTONE BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The best-value dorm on the West Coast. Essential for overlanders, group travellers, and budget backpackers who want an en-suite room at camping prices.

properties.name: JACOBS BAY BACKPACKERS — THE PLOT
properties.address: Plot 307, Main Road, Jacobs Bay, 7380, Western Cape
properties.info: A characterful West Coast glamping option in a genuinely quiet fishing village. Check recent reviews before booking.

properties.name: WEST COAST BACKPACKERS — COZY CORNER KITEHOUSE
properties.info: BackpackersBible.com's top-rated West Coast hostel. Booking.com 9.4/10. The kite surfing capital's definitive backpacker base. Outstanding solo female credentials. Book early.

properties.name: ELANDS BAY OFFSHORE SURF BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The essential Elands Bay surf base. Spartan, purposeful, and completely correct for what it is. Serious surfers only.

properties.name: SEA SHACK
properties.address: Soldaten Bay, Cape Columbine Nature Reserve, Paternoster, 7381
properties.info: The most beautiful glamping experience on the West Coast. Oceanfront wooden shacks inside a nature reserve. Bring towels, food and wine. Stay two nights minimum.

properties.name: THE SURF SHACK HOUSE & BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The better-managed Elands Bay surf option. Excellent for self-catering groups hiring the house for a surf week.

properties.name: BUCCANEERS LODGE & BACKPACKERS
properties.info: One of the great South African backpacker experiences. The Wild Coast's most social hostel, in the most beautiful location.

properties.name: IN THE GREEN BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The Wild Coast's finest quiet option. Exceptional value, beautiful setting, and genuine peace. Best for independent travellers who want the coast without the crowd.

properties.name: COFFEE SHACK BACKPACKERS
properties.info: An iconic Wild Coast hostel. Extraordinary location, extraordinary community culture, exceptional value.

properties.name: BULUNGULA LODGE
properties.address: Nqileni Village, Xhora Mouth AA, Elliotdale District, 5070
properties.info: The most ethically rigorous and culturally immersive hostel in South Africa. Not for comfort-seekers. Essential for anyone who wants to understand what the Wild Coast actually is.

properties.name: WILD LUBANZI BACKPACKERS LODGE
properties.info: The most architecturally distinctive hostel on the Wild Coast. Book the Hobbit House. If it's taken, book a safari tent. Either way, go.

properties.name: THE KRAAL BACKPACKERS
properties.address: Mpande District, Tsweleni, Port St. Johns, 5120
properties.info: For the traveller who wants the Wild Coast in its most unmediated form. Primitive, tranquil, and genuinely extraordinary. Contact by WhatsApp only.

properties.name: MDUMBI BACKPACKERS
properties.info: BackpackersBible.com's top-rated Wild Coast hostel. Community-owned, beachfront surf break, extraordinary setting. One of the best backpacker properties in South Africa. Non-negotiable.

properties.name: VUKANI BACKPACKERS
properties.info: Mdumbi's equally outstanding neighbour. Joint-highest rated on this list. The Driftwood Room is not to be missed.

properties.name: FREEDOM O'CLOCK BACKPACKERS RETREAT
properties.info: Highly-rated, family-run, river-mouth location. The top solo female recommendation in the Mdumbi cluster. Follow the host's directions, not GPS.

properties.name: AMAPONDO BACKPACKERS
properties.address: Erf 647, Second Beach Road, Port St Johns, 5120
properties.info: Beautiful setting and nice accommodation, and still the liveliest bar in PSJ, but the area itself is too lively for the Backpacker's Bible to recommend it without reservation.

properties.name: JUNGLE MONKEY BACKPACKERS
properties.info: A fading icon that has largely traded its traveller roots for a local bar identity. Manage your expectations accordingly.

properties.name: MTHATHA BACKPACKERS & TOURS
properties.info: The safest and most practical Mthatha overnight option. Use it as a transit base; take the Mandela heritage tour. Follow the safety guidance carefully.

properties.name: LOUIS AT MAGWA FALLS
properties.address: Gwexintaba Village, KuGwexintaba, Lusikisiki, Eastern Cape
properties.info: Perhaps the most 'out there' experience in the country. Traditional African culture and one of the country's highest waterfalls at your doorstep. Excellent value for money.

properties.name: STUMBLE INN BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The oldest and most characterful backpacker in the Winelands. In a town of wine estates and tourist infrastructure, it remains resolutely, enjoyably itself. Do the Easy Rider tour.

properties.name: OTTER'S BEND LODGE
properties.info: The essential Franschhoek backpacker base — a riverside farmstay 1km from the gourmet capital of South Africa. Book the cabin if you can stretch to it. Eat the pears.

properties.name: PAARL BACKPACKERS
properties.info: Paarl's only backpacker, and a genuinely useful base for budget travellers exploring the wider Winelands. Call ahead, bring cash, arrive in daylight, and inspect before unpacking.

properties.name: ZULULAND BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The cultural heart of the Zululand backpacker circuit. Thirty years of genuine community relationships, a beautiful Victorian house, and an owner who speaks fluent Zulu. Non-negotiable if you care about understanding where you are.

properties.name: MONZI SAFARIS BACKPACKERS
properties.info: The cleanest, most intelligently designed backpacker option in St Lucia — dome tents with proper beds on a rooftop deck, no dishes, and a discount on your safari. Walk carefully after dark.

properties.name: BIBS INTERNATIONAL BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 310 McKenzie Street, St Lucia Estuary, 3936, KwaZulu-Natal
properties.info: The cheapest entry point to iSimangaliso. Ask to see the room first. En-suite chalet over a basic dorm where possible.

properties.name: ISINKWE SAFARIS BUSH CAMP
properties.info: The definitive Hluhluwe-iMfolozi base camp. 22 hectares of indigenous sand forest, 25 minutes from the Memorial Gate. Book the Tree Cabin for the full experience.

properties.name: CORAL DIVERS
properties.address: Coral Divers Resort, Camp F, Sodwana Bay, iSimangaliso Wetland Park, 3974
properties.info: The definitive Sodwana Bay diving base — inside the park, free beach shuttle, PADI 5 Star dive centre, 30+ years of reef knowledge, boma fires every evening.

properties.name: NATURAL MOMENTS BUSH CAMP & DIVING
properties.info: The most atmospheric option in Sodwana village — genuine passion for the place, a loyal return visitor base, and an honest rusticity that suits some travellers perfectly.

properties.name: THOBEKA BACKPACKERS LODGE
properties.address: Kosi Bay Road, Star Mission Village, 3973
properties.info: The most remote and most quietly extraordinary backpacker in Zululand. Wooden walkways in the bush, 14km from Mozambique. Bring a passport. Stay longer than you planned.

properties.name: CLARENS INN AND BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 403 Van Reenen Street, Clarens, 9707, Free State
properties.info: The only show in town, in the best possible sense. Clarens at the right price, in the right location, with the mountains visible from the garden.

properties.name: MALUTI BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 3232 Nteo Street, Phuthaditjhaba-A, Phuthaditjhaba, 9866, Free State
properties.info: ★ BackpackersBible.com's recommended base for the Tugela Falls hike. The closest accommodation to the Sentinel Car Park trailhead; also the best base for Golden Gate. The platform ratings do not capture what matters most here: the proximity.

properties.name: KARMA BACKPACKERS
properties.address: 2 Piet Retief Street, Kestell, Free State, 9860
properties.info: A Free State option at roughly the midpoint between Amphitheatre and the trailhead. Adequate for the area, although there is little or nothing to do in Kestell itself.
